sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77470" key="pani/xnion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰνίχνιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n77470.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the whole track</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:454" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.454</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
